name: wefans
description: wefans — plataforma de momentos de futebol (paridade com NBA Top Shot)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n back,front -c magenta,cyan "npm -w backend run dev" "npm -w frontend run dev"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.build: npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend run build
